title: Food Connect
description: You can test your pattern detection skills in this relaxed mahjong & connect puzzle game with sweet food theme. You can eliminate pair of same tiles. The line connecting the two clicked tiles cant have more than 2 corners. Can you clear the board before time runs out? Enjoying matching sweet food with 30 puzzle stages in this game. Be careful, the tiles will be collapsed in some stages.
instructions: Use mouse to play this mahjong connect game
